Design with heart. Humans in mind.
Foundations in place.

I help teams build the foundations that unlock scale — navigating big changes, untangling messy flows, and grounding feature work in real user needs. That usually means refining core flows, setting direction, and raising the bar on quality.

View my work

Selected Work

GrooverUI

Groover's first production-ready design system — powering a multilingual, mobile-first marketplace for 50K+ artists and 3,500+ curators.

App Design — Wellpath

End-to-end product design for a wellness & habit-tracking mobile app — research, wireframes, UI, and prototyping.

Web Experience — Forma Studio

An immersive portfolio site for an architectural visualization studio with scroll-driven transitions.
